headline: Devon Energy and Coterra Energy Complete Merger
summary: OKLAHOMA CITY and HOUSTON, May 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Devon Energy Corporation (“Devon”) (NYSE: DVN) and Coterra Energy Inc. (“Coterra”) (NYSE: CTRA) today announced the successful completion of their previously announced all-stock merger (the “Transaction”), creating a premier large-cap shale operator with a high-quality asset base anchored by a leading position in the economic core of the Delaware Basin.
